{"rule":"FORMALLY_KNOWN_AS","sentence":"^\\Q</p> <p> Trinity College Dublin, formally known as The College of the Holy and Undivided Trinity of Queen Elizabeth near Dublin, is Ireland's oldest university, founded in 1592 by Queen Elizabeth I. The School of Physics recently celebrated its 300th anniversary and is home to Ireland's only Nobel Prize winner in Physics, Ernest Walton.\\E$"}
{"rule":"MASTERS_DISSERTATION_THESIS","sentence":"^\\QIt was here that I had the opportunity to collaborate with the Quantum Information Theory Group for my Master's dissertation project, where I explored topics like multi-time Petz recovery in quantum systems.\\E$"}
